utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 items appear. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: 1) health_coverage: The format asks for physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan includes separate physical and mental health entries with plan names, monthly costs, policy numbers, features, and a total health cost. This is fully specified. 2) property_coverage: The format asks for home/contents insurance with costs. The plan provides a specific property coverage plan name, monthly cost, policy number, coverage details (replacement value, address, adventure equipment coverage). This is fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: The format asks for travel insurance with costs. The plan includes a travel plan name, monthly cost, policy number, and coverage features. This is fully specified. 4) additional_services: The format asks for any enhancement services with costs. The plan lists enhancement services but does not include explicit costs per service; however, the format only requires “any enhancement services with costs” broadly—these are typically included features of the above policies and no separate costs are provided. Since the item is present but lacks explicit costs breakdown, it may be considered not fully specified per the strict requirement of “with costs.” 5) total_budget: The format asks for complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan includes monthly and annual totals, savings comparison, effective date, and term. This is fully specified. Therefore, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Identify each policy in the final plan and match to the closest-named option in the ground-truth ratings. The plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Physical Health, LifeFirst Standard Mental Health, LifeFirst Standard Property Coverage, and PrimeTravel Premium Plan. In the ratings, these correspond to: Primary health coverage -> physical: LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 9); mental: LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 9). Property protection -> home_content: LifeFirst Standard Coverage (rating 9). Mobility coverage -> travel_insurance: PrimeTravel Premium Plan (rating 6).
